narrative:
Precinct Rootstown F (precinct in Portage County) has 920 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
